evals.name: eval-clean-pass
evals.prompt: 我剛做完 order-processing pipeline 的開發，plan 在 review-pipeline-logs-workspace/fixtures/order-pipeline/plan.md，實際跑完的 log 在 review-pipeline-logs-workspace/fixtures/order-pipeline-clean/run.log。幫我 review 這次跑的結果是不是照設計跑對了。
evals.expected_output: A report where every one of the 4 plan steps is marked as ran-and-succeeded, output values (item_count=2 matching quantity_decremented=2, charge amount matching order total) checked and matching, no unexpected errors, overall verdict PASS.
assertions: Verdict is a clear, unqualified PASS
All 4 steps (validate, charge, inventory, email) are individually marked as ran & succeeded, each with quoted log-line evidence
item_count (2) and quantity_decremented (2) are explicitly compared and confirmed to match
Report explicitly states no errors/exceptions were found (not just silence on the topic)
Output is saved as a structured report file, not just a chat-only response

evals.name: eval-charge-failure
evals.prompt: 剛跑完 order-processing pipeline，plan 在 review-pipeline-logs-workspace/fixtures/order-pipeline/plan.md，log 在 review-pipeline-logs-workspace/fixtures/order-pipeline-failure/run.log，幫我確認這次執行有沒有問題。
evals.expected_output: A report identifying: validate order succeeded, charge payment failed (card_declined / do_not_honor, with the traceback quoted), inventory update and confirmation email steps never ran (correctly reported as not-reached/missing rather than assumed fine), overall verdict FAIL.
assertions: Step 1 (validate order) is marked as ran & succeeded
Step 2 (charge payment) is marked as failed, citing card_declined / do_not_honor
The traceback / exception detail is quoted, not just summarized as 'an error occurred'
Steps 3 and 4 are explicitly reported as never reached / not executed, not silently assumed to have passed
The report distinguishes the charge decline itself from the pipeline's own abort-and-stop behavior, rather than treating the abort as a second unrelated bug
Output is saved as a structured report file, not just a chat-only response

evals.name: eval-quiet-logging
evals.prompt: 幫我 review 一下這個 pipeline 的 log，plan 在 review-pipeline-logs-workspace/fixtures/order-pipeline/plan.md，log 在 review-pipeline-logs-workspace/fixtures/order-pipeline-quiet/run.log。
evals.expected_output: A report that cannot verify most of the 4 individual steps from the log (only 'processing order' and 'done' exist, no per-step evidence), calls this out clearly in the Logging Quality section as a significant gap (no levels, no step breakdown, no order id/context), and does NOT mark unverifiable steps as a plain pass — verdict should reflect the uncertainty (e.g. PASS WITH WARNINGS or similar), not a clean PASS.
assertions: None of the 4 steps are marked as a confirmed pass (✅) given the lack of log evidence — each is marked unverifiable/missing instead
Logging Quality section explicitly flags: no per-step log lines, no log levels used, and no identifying context (order id, amounts, etc.)
Overall verdict carries an explicit caveat (not an unqualified PASS) reflecting that correctness could not actually be verified
Output Value Checks section explicitly states the checks could not be performed, rather than omitting the section or silently marking them fine
Output is saved as a structured report file, not just a chat-only response
